overall_scene: Henry II receiving news of his sons conspiring with the French king, Richard steps forward and pledges loyalty

resolution_rules.first_generation: Only 480p or 720p available in Generator. No 1080p option on initial generation.
resolution_rules.upscaling: You may upscale the first generation to 1080p after creation.
resolution_rules.1080p_limit: 1080p videos are HARD-CAPPED at 20 seconds maximum. Cannot exceed 20 seconds at 1080p under any circumstances.
resolution_rules.longer_videos: For any final video longer than 20 seconds (e.g. 30s stitched), it must be generated at 720p from the start OR upscaled to 720p early. 1080p cannot be used past the 20-second mark — it will force the clip to 480p or fail.
resolution_rules.recommendation_for_multishot: When building stitched multi-shot scenes longer than 20 seconds total, generate all individual shots at 720p. Reserve 1080p upscaling only for short final deliverables (20 seconds or under). Never plan 1080p for anything past 20 seconds.

generation_notes: CRITICAL: Generate each shot as a SEPARATE 6-10 second clip only. Maintain EXACT continuity of Henry II appearance, costume, crown, scepter, throne, lighting direction, throne room environment, and camera language across all shots for clean post stitching. Use the same reference images for Henry II (throne room) and battle-worn Richard across every shot.
continuity_rules: Strict visual continuity required: same Henry II face/body/costume/lighting from reference, same Richard face/armor/surcoat from reference, consistent throne room architecture and banner placement, consistent torch/window light direction, no changes to character scale or position between shots unless explicitly described in action.
stitching_notes: Design shots with natural edit points (action overlap, J/L-cut friendly, motivated camera movement that can continue across cuts). Leave head/tail handles for clean stitching in editor.

shot_1.description: HENRY THE SECOND (@1) seated on throne receiving grave news from clerics who unfurl scrolls. His face tightens with controlled anger. He grips the scepter tighter. Retainers and clerics fall into uneasy silence. Slow push-in on Henry's face. Motivated low-angle hero shot.

shot_2.description: Battle-worn Richard Lionheart steps forward one deliberate pace beside the throne, hand moving to sword hilt. Intense loyalty and familial tension visible in his posture and eyes. Clerics lean in slightly, scrolls rustle. Henry turns his head slightly toward Richard. Motivated camera drift from Henry to include Richard in frame.

shot_3.description: Richard speaks with quiet intensity: loyalty pledge. Henry listens, controlled anger softening slightly into resolve. Retainers and clerics remain frozen in tense silence. Final low-angle two-shot on Henry and Richard with strong negative space. Emotional weight and political tension.

slots.@1: HENRY THE SECOND (@1) - exact throne room reference image, white and patterned robes, crown, scepter, controlled authority and subtle anger

style: Photorealistic historical drama, rich Plantagenet color palette, high production value, cinematic lighting, emotional realism, motivated camera

output.sequence_length: 18-24 seconds total (stitched from three 6-8 second clips)
output.recommended_resolution: 720p for all shots (stitched total exceeds 1080p 20s cap)
